summary: Iteration 183: Fase 4 - Montaggio e Tracciabilità. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified. New assembly diary feature complete with DDT bolt traceability, ISO 898-1 torque table, on-site assembly management, and client digital signature.
critical_code_review_comments: montaggio.py: Well-structured API with proper Pydantic models for DDT, Diario, and Firma requests
montaggio_service.py: ISO 898-1 torque table correctly implemented with 60 entries (12 diameters × 5 classes)
montaggio.py: DDT save endpoint correctly enriches bolt data with torque values from ISO table
montaggio.py: Firma endpoint properly updates existing diario entry with client signature
MontaggioPanel.js: Clean 4-step workflow (DDT → SERRAGGIO → CANTIERE → FIRMA) with proper state management
MontaggioPanel.js: Cantiere section correctly enforces mandatory photo uploads before proceeding
test_credentials: commessa_id: com_2b99b2db8681 (NF-2026-000008, EN_1090), operators: Ahmed (PIN 1234), Karim (PIN 5678)
seed_data_creation: Created test DDTs, diario entries, photos, and signatures during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 4 Montaggio feature fully implemented. All endpoints at /api/montaggio/*. Frontend Montaggio tab is 4th tab in OfficinaPage with 4 sub-steps (DDT, SERRAGGIO, CANTIERE, FIRMA). Torque table has 60 entries from ISO 898-1. DDT AI analysis uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations.

torque_table.GET /api/montaggio/torque-table: ✓ Returns 60 entries with 12 diameters and 5 classes

ddt_traceability.POST /api/montaggio/ddt/save: ✓ Saves DDT data, enriches with torque values

assembly_diary.POST /api/montaggio/diario: ✓ Saves diary with serraggi, fondazioni, foto IDs

e2e_workflow.complete_flow: ✓ DDT → Photos → Diario → Signature workflow successful

frontend_ui.4_tabs: ✓ TEMPI, FOTO, QUALITÀ, MONTAGGIO tabs visible
frontend_ui.4_substeps: ✓ DDT, SERRAGGIO, CANTIERE, FIRMA steps visible
frontend_ui.ddt_section: ✓ Upload button and saved DDTs list
frontend_ui.serraggio_section: ✓ Bolt list with torque values and SI/NO checkboxes
frontend_ui.cantiere_section: ✓ Foundation check (👍/👎) and mandatory photo uploads
frontend_ui.firma_section: ✓ Client name input, signature canvas, confirm button
